title: 100 Pcs Sewing Hooks and Eyes Set, 3 Styles Hook and Eye Closures Sewing Snaps Kit, Fixed Snap Buttons Fasteners Set, Press Studs Snap Fasteners for Skirt, Bra, Trousers, Dress, Sewing, DIY Crafting
features: 【Superior Material】The sewing hooks and eyes kits are made of high-quality copper material. These snap buttons are bright, strong and durable for long time use use, also not easy to rust and fade, which are practical to use in different sewing projects, making life more convenient.

【Convenient to Use】The snap fasteners are convenient to use, which are effective fasteners for different sewing project. The press studs are easy to buckle together, which work well in tightening the sewing project well and safely, also can be hidden well due to its small size.

【Easy to Carry】100 pairs of snaps and hooks are sorted and stored in a lightweight plastic transparent box, which is easy to carry and can help you collect and sort other small objects. You can apply the press studs snap fasteners to fix up your broken pants, dresses, skirts, slacks, sweaters, etc.

【What You Will Get】You will get 40 pcs bra sewing hooks and eyes, 40 pcs sew-on snaps, and 20 pcs skirt sewing hooks and eyes, totally 100 PCS in this clothing fixing tool set for you, which comes in classic black and white, enough quantity for your daily use.

【Multifunctional】The sewing hooks and eyes closures kit can be applied for various sewing activities or DIY crafts, which is practical and useful to use for your crafts, leather working, meeting your various DIY needs. This is a perfect set of necessary sewing kits for home, sewing work and emergency situations.
description: Specifications: - Item Name: Sewing Hooks and Eyes Set - Material: Copper - Color: Black; White - Quantity: 100 Pcs - Snap Diameter: 12 mm/0.47 in - Bra Hook Eye: Closed Total Length 15 mm/0.59 in - Pants Hook Eye: Model 11# Package Includes: 40 * Sew-on Snaps 40 * Bra Hook Eye 20 * Pants Hook Eye Feature - Snap buttons are used for shirts, sweaters, cardigans, children's clothing, leather, and more, which play a good role in opening and closing and fixing. - Bra hooks and eyes are used to sew bras, shawls, dresses, or other clothes that need to be hidden and fixed. - Pants hooks and eyes are mostly used for sewing suit pants, skirts, dresses, or repairing other worn-out clothing. - This button fastener kit comes with a clear plastic storage box, easy to classify and store in daily life. - Easy to use, simple sewing, smooth opening and closing after firm sewing, perfect fasteners for clothing sewing. Warm Tips ① Hoose a suitable material for sewing to avoid damage to the material. ② Please confirm the size and specifications before purchasing. ③ Buttons are small objects, so children should not touch them.
